questions.text: A security scan flags jQuery 3.4.1 in your project for CVE-2019-11358 (prototype pollution). What is the correct remediation?

options.text: Delete the jQuery file from the vendor directory
Update jQuery to version 3.5.0 or later in package.json, reinstall, and rebuild vendor files
Add a Content Security Policy header to block the vulnerability
Downgrade to jQuery 2.x which doesn't have this CVE

questions.text: You find a Google Analytics Universal Analytics (UA-) tracking tag in a website's HTML. UA was sunset on July 1, 2023. What should you do?

options.text: Replace it with a Google Analytics 4 (GA4) measurement ID
Leave it — it will start working again when Google re-enables UA
Remove the entire script block since it no longer collects data and adds unnecessary network requests
Move it from the head to the body for better performance

questions.text: An SCSS project defines `$primary: #BD5D38` in `_variables.scss`, but several files hardcode `#BD5D38` directly. What is the best practice to fix this?

options.text: Use find-and-replace to change all hex values to the CSS output color
Replace all hardcoded hex values with the `$primary` variable reference and recompile
Create a new variable for each unique usage of the color
Add `!important` to the variable definition to override hardcoded values

questions.text: When using Claude Code to debug a Gulp build pipeline that isn't compiling SCSS correctly, what is the most effective first step?

options.text: Ask Claude to rewrite the entire gulpfile from scratch
Ask Claude to read the gulpfile and SCSS source files, then explain the build pipeline before making changes
Delete node_modules and reinstall everything
Switch from Gulp to Webpack since it's more modern

questions.text: In the context of AI-assisted development, what does 'Discernment' in the 4D framework refer to?

options.text: The ability to write code without any AI assistance
Critically evaluating AI suggestions — asking why, comparing approaches, and rejecting bad outputs
Delegating all coding tasks to the AI
Describing problems in great technical detail
